# Regression with Autoregressive Errors {#autoregressive-errors}

```{r autoregressive-errors-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/autoregressive-errors-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/autoregressive-errors/"
)
```

```{r child-autoregressive-errors, child="../lecture-content/35-autoregressive-errors.Rmd"}
```
